mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current FEDFUNDS at 0.54% indicates accommodative stance
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS < 1.0% do not significantly exceed baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month payroll employment growth decelerates below 100,000 net new jobs, signaling weakening labor demand that triggers equity market repricing downward as investors anticipate reduced consumer spending and corporate earnings pressure over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS monthly change falls below 100,000 persons
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real retail sales (RSAFS) decline month-over-month by more than 1.5%, indicating consumer demand contraction that reduces near-term corporate revenue expectations and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year window, or negative 20-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) expands above 104.5 index points while unemployment remains below 4.5%, indicating tight supply-demand balance that supports corporate profit margins and equity valuations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
regime_hint: tight supply-demand equilibrium with full employment
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window when both conditions are met, or 60-day forward returns in this regime do not exceed baseline by at least 150 basis points (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) fall below 1,050 thousand units annualized while real GDP growth (GDPC1) remains below 2.5% annualized, indicating synchronized demand weakness across residential and aggregate demand that pressures equity valuations downward over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current HOUST at 1,090 thousand units, GDPC1 at 16,727 billion chained 2017 dollars
regime_hint: synchronized demand contraction across housing and aggregate output
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year window when both conditions hold, or negative 60-day returns occur in fewer than 52% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) rises above 245 index points while the federal funds rate remains below 1.0%, indicating real rates are deeply negative, which compresses equity risk premiums and drives positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days as investors seek inflation hedges.
regime_hint: negative real rates with elevated inflation
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 18-month rolling window when both conditions are met, or positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: The unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises by more than 0.4 percentage points over a 3-month rolling window, signaling deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence and discretionary spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days as forward earnings expectations are revised downward.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over any 18-month rolling window, or negative 5-day returns occur in fewer than 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) contracts month-over-month by more than 0.5% while inflation (CPIAUCSL) remains elevated above 243 index points, indicating stagflationary pressure that reduces real corporate profitability and equity valuations, driving negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year window when both conditions are met, or negative 20-day returns occur in fewer than 54% of triggered instances.
